name: Regenerative Medical Technology Group Inc.
business: Regenerative Medical Technology Group, through its subsidiary Global Stem Cells Group, operates a vertically integrated regenerative medicine business, selling physician training, biologics (stem cells, exosomes, peptides), medical equipment, and patient procedures to physicians and clinics globally.

exposures.sentence: Cellgenic manufactures and sells regenerative medicine products that are supplied to physicians and clinics participating in ISSCA programs.
We believe that a major differentiator in 2026 will be the successful launch and integration of the ISSCA AI Platform and ISSCA App.
The Company sells medical and regenerative medicine equipment to physicians and clinics.

catalysts.event: Launch of new Diploma in Cell Therapy & Tissue Engineering
catalysts.sentence: In 2026 we expect to launch a new Diploma in Cell Therapy & Tissue Engineering, postgraduate-level curricula, and fellowship-style training.

catalysts.event: Launch of ISSCA AI Platform and ISSCA App
catalysts.sentence: We believe that a major differentiator in 2026 will be the successful launch and integration of the ISSCA AI Platform and ISSCA App.
Our unaudited information for the first quarter of 2026 shows a 69% increase in revenue compared with the fourth quarter of 2025.
